old_string: 'expected': '<WHAT you expect by next cycle — be specific and falsifiable>',
new_string: 'expected': '<WHAT you expect by next cycle — focus on SYSTEM-OBSERVABLE outcomes (task completions, queue state, system health). For Mev-dependent outcomes, use conditional framing: "IF Mev responds, THEN X". Do NOT predict WHAT Mev will say or when — only predict what YOU control.>',
reason: RL2F accuracy stuck at 26% for 26+ cycles. Root cause: 72% of predictions are 'partial' because they predict Mev's specific response content (e.g., 'Mev responds with Stripe keys or new direction'). When Mev does something different, it's scored partial. Fix: guide predictions toward observable/controllable outcomes and frame Mev-dependent outcomes as conditional.
